# DentalGPT Studio

> AI Front Desk for Dental Clinics — https://dentalgptstudio.com

## What is DentalGPT Studio?

DentalGPT Studio is an AI-powered virtual front desk designed specifically for dental clinics. It answers patient questions 24/7, captures appointment requests, and tracks every lead — so your clinic never misses a patient inquiry again.

## Key Features

- **24/7 AI Chat**: Answers patient questions around the clock, including after hours, weekends, and holidays.
- **Appointment Request Collection**: Patients request appointments directly through the chatbot. Staff reviews and confirms in the dashboard.
- **Lead Capture & Tracking**: Every patient inquiry becomes a trackable lead with name, phone number, and intent — all logged automatically.
- **FAQ Builder**: Train the AI with your clinic's common questions, services, hours, insurance, and policies.
- **Website Widget Embed**: Install on any website in minutes with one line of code. Works with WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, Webflow, and custom sites.
- **Custom Branding**: Match your clinic's colors, logo, and tone so patients feel like they are talking to your team.
- **Dashboard & Insights**: View conversations, leads, and appointment requests in a centralized dashboard.

## Target Audience

- Dental clinic owners and office managers
- Dental practice administrators
- Dentists looking to automate patient communication
- Dental support organizations (DSOs)

## Pricing

- **Starter Plan**: Free forever — AI conversations, basic FAQ training, website widget embed. No credit card required.
- **Professional Plan**: $49/month — Unlimited conversations, appointment request collection, lead capture & tracking, after-hours coverage, dashboard & insights, priority support.

## How to Get Started

1. Sign up at https://dentalgptstudio.com
2. Add your clinic name, services, hours, and FAQs
3. Copy one line of embed code onto your website
4. Your AI front desk is live and answering patients 24/7

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is an AI front desk for dental clinics?**
An AI front desk is a virtual assistant that lives on your dental clinic's website. It answers patient questions 24/7, collects appointment requests, and captures lead information.

**Can the AI bot book appointments?**
Yes. Patients request appointments through the chatbot. The bot collects their preferred date, time, and reason for visit, then logs the request in your dashboard for staff to confirm.

**Does it work with my existing dental website?**
Yes. DentalGPT Studio works with any website platform — WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, Webflow, and custom HTML. Embed with a single line of JavaScript.

**How long does setup take?**
Most dental clinics are up and running in under 5 minutes. Add your clinic info, copy the embed code, and the AI starts responding immediately.

**What kind of questions can the dental AI chatbot answer?**
Any question it's trained on — office hours, accepted insurance plans, service descriptions and pricing, parking directions, new patient forms, and more.

## Use Cases

- After-hours patient inquiry handling
- Automated new patient lead capture
- FAQ automation for dental front desk staff
- Appointment request collection for dental practices
- Multi-location dental practice communication
